channel.title: Trendlyne Latest Market News
channel.description: Latest stock market insights and analyst calls from Trendlyne.

item.title: IPO market defies volatility with 3 positive listings last week, and 4 more lined up
item.description:
The Nifty 50 closed lower today, April 13, after last week’s gain of 5.9%, the largest since February 2021. The on-again, off-again hostilities between the US and Iran have turned the market into a yo...

Premium: No

item.title: Market closes lower after US-Iran ceasefire talks fall through
item.description:
Nifty 50 closed at 23,842.65 (-208.0, -0.9%), BSE Sensex closed at 76,847.57 (-702.7, -0.9%) while the broader Nifty 500 closed at 22,179.05 (-167.7, -0.8%). Market breadth is in the red. Of the 2,769...

Premium: No

item.title: Dividend yields vary across sectors, but Indian IT comes out on top
item.description:
Stock market investors look for returns in two ways: betting on stock prices going up, or through dividends, where companies share a part of their profits. This is where dividend yield comes in. It te...

Premium: No

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - April 10, 2026
item.description:
1. Titan: This gems & jewellery company rose 10% in the past week as its revenue jumped 46% YoY in Q4FY26. Growth remains broad-based, with both domestic and jewellery businesses up over 40%. Consumer...

Premium: No

item.title: After the drop, are stock market valuations finally reasonable?
item.description:
The Nifty 50 opened sharply higher on Wednesday, jumping over 3% after the US and Iran agreed to a two week ceasefire, with Iran agreeing to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The ceasefire is already fragi...

Premium: No

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - April 8, 2026
item.description:
1. Oil And Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC): Geojit BNP Paribas retains its ‘Buy’ call on this oil company, with a target price of Rs 322 per share, an upside of 14.9%. The Israel–Iran conflict current...

Premium: No

item.title: IPO pipeline stays active, while post-listing performance remains subdued
item.description:
The Nifty 50 recovered sharply on Monday, April 6, and closed 1.1% higher after erasing early losses. The rebound triggered by emerging reports of a potential ceasefire framework between the US and Ir...

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - April 2, 2026
item.description:
1. InterGlobe Aviation (IndiGo): The stock of this airline company rose by over 5% on April 1 after it named William Walsh as its next CEO, effective August 3. Walsh is currently the Director General ...

item.title: Gold rising, crude expensive, portfolio volatile: the new financial year begins
item.description:

item.title: Rising energy costs test India’s growth outlook
item.description:
“A rare ‘Goldilocks’ phase of high growth and low inflation.” That is how Reserve Bank of India Governor Sanjay Malhotra described the Indian economy at the December policy meeting. Interest rates wer...
